dataset_name: DynamicESG ML-ESG-3 Chinese Official Split Release

provenance.canonical_paper_title: DynamicESG: A Dataset for Dynamically Unearthing ESG Ratings from News Articles
notes: This module uses the official Chinese ML-ESG-3 shared-task split release only.
Canonical input text is headline only.
No crawler enrichment, article-body recovery, class collapsing, or split modification is included.
The official release stores Impact_Duration as a singleton list, but the canonical task target is normalized to a scalar impact_duration label while preserving the original list in metadata.
Family-stable article_id is reused from the DynamicESG Chinese family so cross-task joins remain trivial across ML-ESG-1, ML-ESG-2, ML-ESG-3, and future sibling modules.

The pinned released JSON is broader than the narrower 3-duration-label workshop framing because it includes NotRelatedtoCompany and NotRelatedtoESGTopic; this module follows the released 5-label single-label space as canonical source of truth.

label_scheme.singleton_list_note: The upstream release stores Impact_Duration as a singleton list; the canonical processed artifact normalizes it to a scalar label.
label_scheme.release_vs_workshop_note: The pinned released JSON is broader than the narrower 3-duration-label workshop framing because it includes NotRelatedtoCompany and NotRelatedtoESGTopic.

hf_publish.upstream_license_note: The DynamicESG repo includes a CC BY-SA 4.0 license file. This module publishes the official Chinese ML-ESG-3 split release in headline-only task format without crawler enrichment.
